text: Alphabet has demonstrated significant outperformance relative to the S&P 500 benchmark, generating 68.82% returns over the past year compared to 15.35% for the benchmark, representing excess returns of approximately 53 percentage points. Recent momentum continues with 7.79% returns over the past 30 days versus 0.93% for the benchmark. This outperformance reflects investor confidence in AI-driven growth across Cloud, Search, and YouTube segments. However, market participants are evaluating whether this momentum can sustain the company's approximately $4 trillion valuation, particularly as competitive dynamics in AI and cloud infrastructure intensify alongside Amazon and other technology peers.
